integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OSCAR EMR web interface to schedule the meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OSCAR EMR GUI. There should be no terminal windows executing SQL queries or cURL commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the appointment was genuinely created within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The appointment appears properly rendered within the EMR's schedule grid with standard UI elements, rather than just being typed into a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing database prompts (like mysql>) or direct INSERT/UPDATE commands for the schedule.
